About
Contact

Reader and editorial inquiries.

Use this page to send correction notes, broken-link reports, dream symbol suggestions, or partnership inquiries related to Dream Meaning Guide.

Email:
guan@shanyuegroup.com

What helps us respond

For corrections, include the page URL and the sentence that needs review. For symbol suggestions, describe the dream symbol, the context in which readers may search for it, and whether the suggestion is about cultural meaning, journaling, or general reflection. We cannot interpret private emergencies or provide individualized mental health support by email.

Content boundary

The site treats dreams as reflection material. It does not diagnose medical or psychological conditions, predict the long-term, or claim to know another person's hidden thoughts. If a dream is connected to fear, trauma, self-harm, unsafe behavior, or severe sleep disruption, contact a qualified professional or emergency support service.

Partnership messages should fit this boundary. We may consider journaling tools, printable worksheets, educational resources, or report products, but not fear-based promises or guaranteed interpretations.

Please do not send private medical records, crisis details, passwords, payment card information, or identifying documents. A short editorial note with the relevant URL is enough for most site questions.

Dream Meaning Guide
